obliterate.name: Obliterate
obliterate.description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 25 times.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Obliterate
perfect_version.description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 25 times.

synergies: Striker's Battlegear (stacks naturally during sustained fire)
Any high crit chance build (AR, LMG, SMG)
obliterate.notes: The premier offensive chest talent for sustained DPS. Pairs with Vigilance backpack for a classic high-damage combo. Perfect Obliterate on Equalizer extends stack duration to 10s, making it easier to maintain near-max stacks.

glass_cannon.name: Glass Cannon
glass_cannon.description: All damage you deal is amplified by 25%. All damage you take is amplified by 50%.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Glass Cannon
perfect_version.description: All damage you deal is amplified by 30%. All damage you take is amplified by 60%.

glass_cannon.pvp_modifier: Incoming damage amplification is reduced in PvP; damage output amplification remains.
synergies: Unbreakable backpack (armor recovery offsets the risk)
glass_cannon.notes: Glass Cannon is the highest raw damage amplifier on a chest but requires careful play to avoid being one-shotted. Best paired with shields, Unbreakable, or very high max armor to survive the incoming damage penalty.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.requirement: Requires bonus armor to be active
intimidate.description: While you have bonus armor, amplifies total weapon damage by 35% to enemies within 10 meters.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Intimidate
perfect_version.description: While you have bonus armor, amplifies total weapon damage by 40% to enemies within 10 meters.

intimidate.pvp_modifier: Range and effectiveness may be reduced in Dark Zone/Conflict.
synergies: Adrenaline Rush backpack (generates bonus armor near enemies)
Bloodsucker backpack (keeps bonus armor stacks up)
Striker's Battlegear with bonus armor maintenance
intimidate.notes: Extremely strong for aggressive close-range play. Must maintain bonus armor for the buff to be active — pair with Adrenaline Rush or Bloodsucker. The 10-meter range restriction limits it to CQC builds.

spotter.name: Spotter
spotter.description: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 15% to pulsed enemies.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Spotter
perfect_version.description: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.

synergies: Drone Pulse or Remote Pulse skill
spotter.notes: Excellent when paired with Flatline weapon talent since Flatline self-applies pulse after 2-3 kills. Works well in group play where a teammate maintains pulse uptime. Both weapon and skill damage benefit.

unbreakable.name: Unbreakable
unbreakable.description: When your armor is depleted, repair 95% of your armor. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Unbreakable
perfect_version.description: When your armor is depleted, repair 100% of your armor. Cooldown: 55 seconds.

synergies: Strained weapon talent (benefits from low armor)
unbreakable.notes: A lifesaver in high-difficulty content. The 60-second cooldown is long but the 95% repair is enormous. Often paired with Clutch backpack or Strained weapon talent to intentionally leverage low-armor states. Near-mandatory for some solo builds.

overwatch.name: Overwatch
overwatch.requirement: Must remain in cover for 10 seconds
overwatch.description: After staying in cover for 10 seconds, you and your allies within 30 meters gain 12% bonus weapon and skill damage as long as you remain in cover or perform cover-to-cover movements.
synergies: Directive or hard content group builds
overwatch.notes: Niche but strong for group play in content where you can hold cover. The 10-second ramp-up is punishing in mobile fights. Works better on designated marksman roles. Less useful in solo or aggressive builds.

kinetic_momentum.name: Kinetic Momentum
kinetic_momentum.description: While in combat, each skill active or not on cooldown generates stacks. Each stack increases skill damage by 1% and skill repair by 2% up to 15 stacks per skill. Stacks are lost when the skill goes on cooldown.
synergies: Skill builds with multiple active skills
kinetic_momentum.notes: Best on pure skill builds that keep skills off cooldown. Up to 15% skill damage and 30% skill repair per skill is substantial. Loses stacks whenever skills recharge, so not ideal for builds with low-cooldown rapid-use skills.

headhunter.name: Headhunter
headhunter.description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 45 seconds deals an additional 125% of that killing blow's damage, capped at 800% weapon damage. This cap is raised to 1250% if your headshot damage is greater than 150%.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Headhunter
perfect_version.description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 45 seconds deals an additional 125% of that killing blow's damage, capped at 1250% weapon damage (always, regardless of headshot damage stat).

headhunter.pvp_modifier: Cap significantly reduced in PvP to prevent one-shot kills.
synergies: Marksman rifles with First Blood talent
headhunter.notes: Headhunter enables massive burst damage. The classic combo is getting a headshot kill then swapping to a shotgun to dump the buffed shot. Requires consistent headshot kills to maintain uptime. Perfect Headhunter removes the headshot damage threshold requirement for the higher cap.

vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.description: Deploying your shield grants 45% bonus armor to you and all allies within 20 meters for 20 seconds. Cooldown: 25 seconds.
vanguard.notes: Strong team support talent. 45% bonus armor to all nearby allies on shield deployment is very potent in group content. Less valuable in solo play or non-shield builds.

braced.name: Braced
braced.description: While in cover, weapon handling is increased by 45%.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Braced
perfect_version.description: While in cover, weapon handling is increased by 50%.

synergies: LMG or AR builds that fire from cover
braced.notes: A decent quality-of-life talent for cover-heavy playstyles. Weapon handling affects bloom and stability, so it can improve sustained accuracy at range. Outclassed by damage-focused talents in most builds.

efficient.name: Efficient
efficient.description: Using an armor kit has a 50% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Efficient
perfect_version.description: Using an armor kit has a 75% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

synergies: Builds focused on armor kit charges
efficient.notes: Niche survivability talent. The 50% non-consume chance is nice for long solo sessions but does not compete with offensive chest talents in most build scenarios. Good for beginners.

empathic_resolve.name: Empathic Resolve
empathic_resolve.description: Repairing an ally grants them a damage bonus. The bonus scales from 3% at skill tier 0 to 15% at skill tier 6.
synergies: Group play with Restorer Hive or Healing Seeker Mine
empathic_resolve.notes: Pure group support talent. Rewards active healing of allies with a damage buff to them. Scales well with skill tier but is niche outside of dedicated support roles.

entrench.name: Entrench
entrench.requirement: Must be in cover with low armor
entrench.description: Headshots from cover repair 20% of your armor. Cooldown: 20 seconds.
entrench.notes: Passive armor recovery for headshot-focused builds in cover. The 20-second cooldown limits uptime. Outcompeted by more impactful chest talents in most scenarios.

explosive_delivery.name: Explosive Delivery
explosive_delivery.description: When you deploy a skill it lands with a bang, dealing explosive damage in an area. Damage scales with skill tier from 25% to 100% of the skill's damage.
synergies: Exotic Artificer Hive or Stinger Hive
explosive_delivery.notes: Interesting utility for skill builds that deploy frequently. The explosion can interrupt enemy animations and deal meaningful bonus damage at higher skill tiers.

focus.name: Focus
focus.description: While aiming, gain +5% weapon damage every second, up to a maximum of +50%. Buff is lost when you stop aiming.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Focus
perfect_version.description: While aiming, gain +6% weapon damage every second, up to a maximum of +60%.

focus.notes: Very strong for dedicated marksman/sniper builds that ads-camp in longer engagements. Requires 8x scope or higher, restricting use cases. The stacking buff becomes powerful after a few seconds of sustained aiming.

gunslinger.name: Gunslinger
gunslinger.description: Swapping weapons grants +20% weapon damage for 5 seconds. The buff is removed if you swap again.
synergies: Headhunter (dump the proc on a second weapon)
gunslinger.notes: Enables weapon-swap damage windows. Common in builds that alternate between a damage dealer and a finisher. Works well with Headhunter — shoot a headshot kill, swap for +20% on the Headhunter proc.

mad_bomber.name: Mad Bomber
mad_bomber.description: Grenades have +2m radius and can be cooked. Lethal grenades refund the grenade on a kill.
synergies: Any build that uses grenades frequently
Directive modifiers that restrict skill use
mad_bomber.notes: Niche talent for grenade-focused play. The refund mechanic is nice but grenades are not a primary damage source in most builds.

reassigned.name: Reassigned
reassigned.description: Killing an enemy adds special ammo to your sidearm: armor-piercing, incendiary, or hollow point. Cooldown: 15 seconds.
synergies: Headhunter combos using pistol as dump weapon
reassigned.notes: Adds a fun layer to pistol play. Not a meta talent but useful for builds that use sidearms as a secondary damage source.

skilled.name: Skilled
skilled.description: Skill kills have a 25% chance to reset skill cooldowns. If the skill is already active, this refreshes its duration instead.
synergies: Skill builds that deal direct damage
skilled.notes: Strong for skill-damage builds. A 25% reset chance generates a lot of extra uptime in dense enemy encounters. Works best with skills that kill frequently such as the Explosive Seeker Mine.

spark.name: Spark
spark.description: Dealing skill damage to an enemy increases total weapon damage by 15% for 15 seconds.
spark.notes: Good for hybrid builds that mix skill and weapon damage. Easy to proc with damage-dealing skills like turrets, drones, or mines. A more accessible version of the In Sync weapon talent mechanic.

tag_team.name: Tag Team
tag_team.description: Hitting an enemy with a skill marks them for 5 seconds. Shooting a marked enemy with a weapon reduces the skill's remaining cooldown by 6 seconds.
tag_team.notes: Niche cooldown management tool. Works best when you apply skill effects that tag many targets so you can chain weapon shots for rapid cooldown recovery.

tamper_proof.name: Tamper Proof
tamper_proof.description: Enemies who approach within 4 meters of your deployed skills are shocked for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds per skill.
synergies: Skill builds that deploy static skills
Status effect builds with Wicked or Shock & Awe
tamper_proof.notes: Defensive utility talent for skill builds. The shock can interrupt rushers but 10-second cooldown limits reliability. Interesting synergy with Shock & Awe backpack.

trauma.name: Trauma
trauma.description: Headshots apply blind to the target for 3 seconds (cooldown: 30 seconds). Chest shots apply bleed to the target for 10 seconds (cooldown: 30 seconds).
trauma.notes: Dual status effect applicator. Good for status builds that need consistent bleed or blind application without relying entirely on weapon talents. The 30-second cooldowns limit high uptime.

protected_reload.name: Protected Reload
protected_reload.description: Reloading grants 20% bonus armor for 5 seconds. Allies within 10 meters also receive 0-18% bonus armor based on your defensive core attributes.
protected_reload.notes: Team support talent that rewards frequent reloading. The ally armor scales with your own defensive cores, making it most effective on blue-focused support characters.

vigilance.name: Vigilance
vigilance.description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage removes this buff for 4 seconds.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Vigilance
perfect_version.description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage removes this buff for 3 seconds.
perfect_version.found_on: The Gift (named backpack by Providence Defense)

vigilance.pvp_modifier: Damage bonus reduced to approximately 12% in PvP.
synergies: Builds that can avoid taking damage
vigilance.notes: The most universally used backpack talent in the game. A flat 25% weapon damage boost is enormous. Perfect Vigilance reduces the downtime from 4s to 3s after being hit. Pairs with Obliterate for the definitive DPS chest/backpack combo.

adrenaline_rush.name: Adrenaline Rush
adrenaline_rush.description: When within 10 meters of an enemy, gain stacking bonus armor. Each stack grants 20% bonus armor, up to 3 stacks. Stacks are applied every 2 seconds while the condition is met.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Adrenaline Rush
perfect_version.description: When within 10 meters of an enemy, gain stacking bonus armor. Each stack grants 23% bonus armor, up to 3 stacks.

synergies: Intimidate chest (requires bonus armor to activate)
adrenaline_rush.notes: Essential backpack for aggressive CQC builds. The bonus armor enables Intimidate chest and provides passive survivability. Up to 69% total bonus armor at 3 stacks is very tanky. Works seamlessly with Hunter's Fury set.

wicked.name: Wicked
wicked.description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20 seconds.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Wicked
perfect_version.description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 23 seconds.

synergies: Status effect builds (bleed, burn, shock, blind)
wicked.notes: Powerful offensive backpack for any build that consistently applies status effects. Easy to maintain uptime with status-effect weapon talents like Sadist (bleed), Ignited (burn), or Eyeless (blind). Perfect Wicked's 23-second duration improves uptime.

opportunistic.name: Opportunistic
opportunistic.requirement: Must have marksman rifle or shotgun drawn
opportunistic.description: Enemies hit with a shotgun or marksman rifle amplify damage from all sources to that enemy by 10% for 5 seconds.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Opportunistic
perfect_version.description: Enemies hit with a shotgun or marksman rifle amplify damage from all sources by 15% for 5 seconds.

synergies: Group play (team benefits from the debuff)
Explosive Seeker Mine for burst windows
opportunistic.notes: Very strong in group content as all damage sources benefit from the debuff applied to enemies. Solo it is excellent on shotgun/marksman builds. The debuff from all sources includes skills and teammates.

combined_arms.name: Combined Arms
combined_arms.description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage and healing by 25% for 3 seconds.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Combined Arms
perfect_version.description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage and healing by 30% for 3 seconds.

combined_arms.notes: Core backpack for hybrid builds. The 3-second window is short but easy to maintain with any weapon that fires continuously. Pairs with Spark chest for mutual weapon/skill damage buffing.

tech_support.name: Tech Support
tech_support.description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 20 seconds.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Tech Support
perfect_version.description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27 seconds.

tech_support.notes: The go-to backpack for pure skill damage builds. Skill kills are plentiful with explosive mines or drones. The 20-27 second duration means even a single skill kill per cycle keeps the buff running.

composure.name: Composure
composure.description: While in cover, increases total weapon damage by 15%.
composure.notes: Simple cover-based damage bonus. Not as impactful as Vigilance but has no deactivation mechanic. Best in builds where you consistently fight from cover.

companion.name: Companion
companion.description: When within 10 meters of an ally or a deployed skill, gain +15% weapon damage.
companion.notes: Easy to trigger with static skills like turrets or hives deployed near you. In group content, proximity to allies keeps it active. Less reliable in solo without skill deployment.

bloodsucker.name: Bloodsucker
bloodsucker.description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +10% bonus armor for 10 seconds. Maximum 10 stacks.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Bloodsucker
perfect_version.description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10 seconds. Maximum 10 stacks.

synergies: Intimidate chest (bonus armor activates the talent)
bloodsucker.notes: Provides a huge armor buffer in packs of enemies. Up to 100% (or 120% Perfect) bonus armor with 10 stacks. Enables Intimidate chest in kill-rich scenarios. Excellent for open-world and Countdown.

clutch.name: Clutch
clutch.description: While your armor is below 15%, critical hits repair 2% of your max armor. Kills while below 15% armor fully repair your armor over 4-10 seconds based on offensive cores.
synergies: Unbreakable chest (survive the depletion, then Clutch keeps you going)
Strained weapon talent (benefits from low armor)
clutch.notes: Great safety net for aggressive builds that run low on armor. Clutch and Unbreakable together give two layers of low-armor recovery. The kill repair scales with red cores, favoring offensive builds.

calculated.name: Calculated
calculated.description: Killing an enemy from cover reduces the cooldown of your skills by 10-15% based on skill tier.
calculated.notes: Good for skill-reliant builds that fight from cover. Cover is a restriction but covers most content. 10-15% CDR per kill stacks up quickly in dense encounters.

creeping_death.name: Creeping Death
creeping_death.description: Applying a status effect to an enemy spreads it to all enemies within 5 meters. Cooldown: 15 seconds.
synergies: Status effect weapon talents (Sadist, Eyeless, Ignited)
creeping_death.notes: Essential for status effect build AOE. Spreading burn, bleed, or shock to groups dramatically increases status effect uptime and DPS. Best in Eclipse Protocol builds.

energize.name: Energize
energize.description: Using an armor kit increases your skill tier by 1 for 20 seconds, or triggers Skill Overcharge if already at tier 6. Cooldown: 60 seconds.
energize.notes: Interesting skill tier manipulation. The Overcharge proc at tier 6 is powerful but requires careful timing. The 60-second cooldown means it's a once-per-fight tool in most engagements.

leadership.name: Leadership
leadership.description: Performing a cover-to-cover movement grants 15% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 30 meters. The bonus is tripled if you end within 10 meters of an enemy.

perfect_version.name: Perfect Leadership
perfect_version.description: Performing cover-to-cover grants 20% of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 30 meters. The bonus is tripled if you end within 10 meters of an enemy.

synergies: Tank or support builds with high max armor
leadership.notes: Strong team support tool in group play. Higher max armor means bigger bonus armor grants to allies. Tripling the bonus near enemies rewards aggressive cover movement.

overclock.name: Overclock
overclock.description: Deploying a skill increases reload speed by 15% and reduces skill cooldowns by 15% for all allies within 10 meters for 15 seconds.
overclock.notes: Team CDR and reload speed buff on skill deploy. Useful in organized group content where multiple players benefit from coordinated skill use.

protector.name: Protector
protector.description: When your shield takes damage, grant 15% of your shield's max armor as bonus armor to all allies within 10 meters. Cooldown: 3 seconds.
protector.notes: Passive group armor distribution while tanking hits on a shield. Works with Vanguard chest for layered group armor support.

safeguard.name: Safeguard
safeguard.description: While at full armor, skill repair and healing to you is doubled.
safeguard.notes: Niche healer talent. Doubles incoming skill repairs at full armor, which is situational since healing is most needed when damaged. Best in coordinated group play where armor is maintained.

shock_and_awe.name: Shock and Awe
shock_and_awe.description: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 20 seconds.
shock_and_awe.notes: Good for skill builds that can apply status effects passively. Unlike Wicked, this buffs skill damage rather than weapon damage — ideal for pure skill or hybrid setups.

unstoppable_force.name: Unstoppable Force
unstoppable_force.description: Kills grant +5% total weapon damage for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.
synergies: AR or SMG builds with high kill rate
unstoppable_force.notes: Ramps up to 25% weapon damage bonus with 5 stacks of kills. In dense content the stacks build quickly. Less efficient in boss-only fights. Competing backpack option against Vigilance.

versatile.name: Versatile
versatile.description: Swapping weapons grants +35% weapon damage at close range to the weapon you swap to, scaling down to +10% at maximum range. Duration: 5 seconds.
versatile.notes: Good for weapon-swap builds that exploit Gunslinger and Headhunter. The range scaling rewards keeping swapped weapons in optimal engagement range.

concussion.name: Concussion
concussion.description: Headshots grant +15% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Marksman rifle or rifle kills reset the duration.
concussion.notes: Consistent weapon damage buff for headshot-focused builds. The kill duration reset makes it very easy to maintain with marksman rifles.

galvanize.name: Galvanize
galvanize.requirement: Must apply a CC status effect
galvanize.description: Applying blind, ensnare, or confused to an enemy grants 40% bonus armor to you and allies within 10 meters.
synergies: Sniper or Chem Launcher with snare
galvanize.notes: Niche but powerful when CC is reliably applied. 40% bonus armor for the team on CC application is very strong in PvP. Less consistent in PvE where CC is not always available.
